title: $1,000 in Bitcoin at Start of 2020
description: What $1,000 invested in Bitcoin on January 1, 2020 would be worth today. BTC was at ~$7,200, just before COVID crashed markets globally — and before the 2020-2021 bull run that took Bitcoin to nearly $69,000. This is the most recent 'obvious in hindsight' entry point.

major_drawdowns.note: COVID crash. BTC dropped from ~$7,200 to ~$3,800 in days before recovering.

educational_note: Bitcoin fell 50% in the March 2020 COVID crash — then rebounded to nearly $69,000 within 20 months. The COVID crash was one of the greatest short-term buying opportunities in Bitcoin's history for investors who held (or bought more).
volatility_warning: Bitcoin is highly volatile. Even within this 5-year holding period, the investment fell as low as ~$530 during the March 2020 COVID crash before recovering.
